name: Daichi the Stoneheart
dialogue: Stone doesn’t flinch. Steel doesn’t bend. Obsidian doesn’t forgive.
Show me you can take a hit without breaking.
preBattleLine: Daichi stamps the floor. Cracks spider outward. His team rises from the stone.
postDefeatDialogue: Daichi nods once. The cracks in the floor seal shut.
You held the line. Tsubaki waits by the water basin — she’ll test your endurance.
